items.title: Solana proposes ‘Constellation’ upgrade to curb MEV and enforce fair transaction ordering
items.whyYouShouldCare: The proposed ‘Constellation’ upgrade aims to reduce miner extractable value (MEV), potentially enhancing transaction fairness and user trust in the Solana network.

items.title: Solana: Can SOL target $110 as KEY metrics signal buying pressure?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Key metrics indicating buying pressure could position SOL favorably, suggesting a potential upward trend in its market performance.

items.title: Solana bets on AI agents: Foundation says network is becoming core infrastructure for ‘agentic’ internet
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's focus on AI agents positions the network as a foundational layer for future internet developments, which may drive increased usage and adoption.
